title: Enforce Dedicated Config Servers for Sharded Clusters

bySection.heading: Step 1: Configure the MongoDB Atlas Terraform Provider.
Step 3: Create the policies by using Terraform.

codeBlocks.content:
export MONGODB_ATLAS_PUBLIC_KEY="<your public key>"
export MONGODB_ATLAS_PRIVATE_KEY="<your private key>"

codeBlocks.section: Step 1: Configure the MongoDB Atlas Terraform Provider.
Step 1: Configure the MongoDB Atlas Terraform Provider.
codeBlocks.content: terraform init -upgrade

codeBlocks.section: Step 3: Create the policies by using Terraform.
codeBlocks.content: terraform apply

forbid (
   principal,
   action == ResourcePolicy::Action::"cluster.modify",
   resource
 )
 unless
 { context.cluster.minTLSVersion == ResourcePolicy::TLSVersion::"tls1_2" };
